title: Display heart icon for rating question on forms
excerpt: Please update forms to display the rating icon according to the column setting and allow the hearts. This way the question matches the icon, example “How much did you love it?” 5 hearts instead of 5 stars.

posts.author: WLane (Wally Lane)
posts.cookedHtml: Please update forms to display the rating icon according to the column setting and allow the hearts. This way the question matches the icon, example “How much did you love it?” 5 hearts instead of 5 stars.
